Demonstration Garden Interactive Maps

West Newbury Wild and Native

← Back to Website

West Newbury Wild and Native has three demonstration gardens in town for you to visit and explore. Each has been planted with regionally native species to support local pollinators and birds. Click any garden to open its interactive map.

🐝
Library Garden
490 Main St
Open Map →
Town Hall Garden
381 Main St
Open Map →
Pipestave Garden
693 Main St
